title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Swiggy Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Swiggy Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Swiggy Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Nagpur-based team.

About Swiggy Global Group:
Swiggy Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
